title: Ultra Silky Ukrainian Mushroom Stew
description: A yeasty and indulgent Ukrainian dish featuring ketchup and katsuramuki-cut mushrooms, made in a claypot and friendly to dairy-free diets.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 300 degrees Fahrenheit.
Heat the olive oil in the claypot over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional 1 minute.
Add the katsuramuki-cut mushrooms and cook until they release their liquid and start to brown, about 5 minutes.
Add the ketchup, vegetable broth, yeast extract, salt, and black pepper, and stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a simmer, then cover the claypot with a lid.
Transfer the claypot to the preheated oven and bake for 20 minutes.
Remove the claypot from the oven and stir in the chopped parsley.
Serve the stew hot, garnished with additional parsley if desired.
